metadata.description: Specmint-core-html marketplace containing the specmint-core-html plugin for persistent, resumable AI coding specs. Part of the Mint plugin family.

plugins.name: specmint-core-html
plugins.description: Structured spec management for AI coding workflows. Replaces ephemeral plans with persistent, resumable specs built through deep research, iterative interviews, architecture diagrams, library comparisons, and comprehensive testing strategies.
